summary: Users frequently encounter technical issues such as app crashes, slow or failed transactions, and login problems. Customer service is widely reported as unresponsive, slow, and ineffective, especially regarding account access and fraud cases. Additionally, many users experience account access problems including frozen accounts, blocked payments, and difficulties receiving SMS codes or updating contact details.

examples: App keeps locking up and needs re-download daily
App often logs me out and requires passcode reset
App is riddled with bugs causing money to disappear
topProblems.name: App and Technical Issues

examples: Customer service is non existent, avoid!
No feedback or callbacks from support
Customer service just repeats problem like a broken AI
topProblems.name: Poor Customer Service

examples: Frozen account with no explanation and money inaccessible
Can't receive SMS code for login due to old number
Payments are delayed or blocked affecting bills and credit rating
topProblems.name: Account Access and Payment Problems
